name: Feature
about: New user-facing behavior or capability (feat:)
---

## Summary

<!-- What does this change deliver for users or the product? -->

## Scope

<!-- Optional: links to issues, design notes, or context -->

## Commits

Use **`feat:`** or **`feat(scope):`** in commit titles, e.g. `feat: add export for brand tokens`.

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is tested locally or covered by automated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] User-visible previews or generated assets are updated if this PR affects them (see `AGENTS.md`)
